title: cyphia glabra
intro: Cyphia glabra, also known as the smooth king's cup, is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Cyphia glabra include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Cyphia glabra can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
